title: limnorchis × lassenii
intro: Limnorchis × lassenii, also known as the Lassen's orchid, is a hybrid orchid plant that is a cross between two species of the Limnorchis genus. While I can't verify its medicinal properties, the plant is said to have various health benefits, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. However, I can't provide information on herbal preparations using this plant. Unfortunately, more research is needed to confirm the specific health benefits and medicinal properties associated with Limnorchis × lassenii.
